description_first_500:
Never take meeting notes again. Otter AI is the fastest way to transcribe voice in real time. Get a meeting assistant that records audio, writes notes, automatically captures slides, and generates summaries. 

Available in English, Spanish, French and Japanese. Otter AI is also available on the web. Start for free.

Trusted by over 10 million people and featured by Apple as "App of the Day" and "Editors' Choice." 

Automated meeting notes for Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, and more. Stay co
